problem id: 84e3f9f7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00111111 -> 01111101
  00001101 -> 00011010
  00011000 -> 00110001
  11110100 -> 11100111
  10111011 -> 01111101
  10011110 -> 00110101
  01100110 -> 11001010
  01010010 -> 10100001
  10111001 -> 01111001
  10010100 -> 00100001

query: 00110001
predicted answer: 01100001
